records.question: Which genres are exactly Role-Playing?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.id FROM genre
WHERE genre.genre_name = 'Role-Playing'
records.pred_sql: SELECT genre.id FROM genre WHERE genre.genre_name = 'Role-Playing'

records.question: Which genres include the game That's So Raven?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.id FROM genre
JOIN game ON genre.id = game.genre_id
WHERE game.game_name = 'That''s So Raven'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT genre.id
FROM genre
INNER JOIN game ON genre.id = game.genre_id
WHERE game.game_name = 'That'

records.question: What genres named Misc are associated with the game We Sing Deutsche Hits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.id FROM genre
JOIN game ON genre.id = game.genre_id
WHERE genre.genre_name = 'Misc' AND game.game_name = 'We Sing Deutsche Hits'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM genre g
INNER JOIN game ga ON g.id = ga.genre_id
WHERE g.genre_name = 'Misc'
AND ga.game_name = 'We Sing Deutsche Hits'

records.question: Which genres labeled as Action include the game named Space Camp?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.id FROM genre
JOIN game ON genre.id = game.genre_id
WHERE game.game_name = 'Space Camp' AND genre.genre_name = 'Action'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM genre g
INNER JOIN game ga ON g.id = ga.genre_id
WHERE g.genre_name = 'Action'
AND ga.game_name = 'Space Camp'
